meta.note: §7 'Quotients' lives in Chapter 2 (Manifolds), pdf p90–101, printed p71–82. Ch1 §1–§3 = pdf p22–52, printed p3–33. Printed = pdf - 19 in this region. Gold is anchored to STABLE LABELS (Tu's own §N / N.M / 'Theorem 7.x' scheme), not node_ids, because a_nodes is empty this round. B/C map labels -> node_ids when A lands.

queries.query_text: Theorem 7.7
queries.intent: label_lookup: find the exact node carrying label 'Theorem 7.7' (Hausdorff quotient <=> closed graph).

queries.query_text: definition of the quotient topology
queries.intent: definition_lookup: the construction defining open sets in S/~ via preimages under the projection (subsection 7.1).

queries.query_text: Proposition 7.1
queries.intent: label_lookup: continuity of the induced map f-bar on a quotient.

queries.query_text: Corollary 7.8
queries.intent: label_lookup: a space is Hausdorff iff the diagonal is closed.

queries.query_text: Taylor's theorem with remainder
queries.intent: named_lookup: the lemma stating the Taylor expansion with remainder on a star-shaped open set (Lemma 1.4).

queries.query_text: Proposition 3.8 even permutation inversions
queries.intent: label_lookup: a permutation is even iff it has an even number of inversions.

queries.query_text: definition of real projective space RP^n
queries.intent: definition_lookup: RP^n as the quotient of R^{n+1}-{0} by scalar equivalence (subsection 7.6).

queries.query_text: Leibniz rule for a vector field
queries.intent: named_lookup: Proposition 2.6, the Leibniz/product rule for a C-infinity vector field acting on functions.

queries.query_text: what makes a map a quotient map
queries.intent: concept: the defining universal/continuity property of the quotient topology and induced maps (7.1–7.2, Prop 7.1).

queries.query_text: difference between smooth (C-infinity) and analytic functions
queries.intent: concept: subsection 1.1 contrasting C-infinity vs analytic, with the flat-at-0 counterexample (Example 1.3).

queries.query_text: when is a quotient space Hausdorff
queries.intent: concept: conditions for Hausdorffness of S/~ — the section's main results (Prop 7.4, Thm 7.7, Cor 7.8).

queries.query_text: tangent vectors as derivations
queries.intent: concept: §2's reinterpretation of tangent vectors at a point as point-derivations (Thm 2.2, Lemma 2.1).

queries.query_text: anticommutativity of the wedge product
queries.intent: concept: the alternating/anticommutative property of the wedge product (Prop 3.21, Cor 3.23).

queries.query_text: open equivalence relation and second countability of the quotient
queries.intent: concept: how an open equivalence relation transfers second-countability to S/~ (Thm 7.9, Cor 7.10).

queries.query_text: gluing the edges of a square to make a torus
queries.intent: concept: the motivating identification/gluing example opening §7 (intro prose + Example 7.2).

queries.query_text: why a quotient of a manifold need not be a manifold
queries.intent: concept: the section intro's caution + necessary condition for Hausdorff quotient (§7 intro, Prop 7.4).

queries.query_text: what comes immediately after Theorem 7.7
queries.intent: structural_neighbor: the next labeled node after Theorem 7.7 (expected Corollary 7.8).

queries.query_text: which definitions and results are in subsection 7.5 Open Equivalence Relations
queries.intent: structural_contains: enumerate labeled nodes under subsection 7.5 (Example 7.6, Thm 7.7, Cor 7.8, Thm 7.9, Cor 7.10).

queries.query_text: what is the proof attached to Proposition 7.3
queries.intent: structural_proof: the proof node proving Proposition 7.3 (f-bar is a homeomorphism).

queries.query_text: which propositions and corollaries are in subsection 7.7 The Standard C-infinity Atlas on RP^n
queries.intent: structural_contains: labeled nodes under 7.7 (Prop 7.14, Cor 7.15, Prop 7.16).

queries.query_text: what comes right before Theorem 2.2
queries.intent: structural_neighbor: the previous labeled node before Theorem 2.2 (expected Lemma 2.1).

queries.query_text: list the subsections of §3 The Exterior Algebra of Multicovectors
queries.intent: structural_contains: subsection headings 3.1–3.10 under §3.

queries.query_text: results that depend on the quotient construction and the projection being an open map
queries.intent: expansion: from the open-equivalence-relation construction, gather dependent results (Thm 7.9, Cor 7.10, Prop 7.14, Cor 7.15).

queries.query_text: everything needed to prove that real projective space RP^n is Hausdorff
queries.intent: expansion: Prop 7.16 and its dependencies (Thm 7.7, open equiv relation Prop 7.14, definition of RP^n).

queries.query_text: results that build on Corollary 7.10 about second-countable quotients
queries.intent: expansion: forward dependents/uses of Cor 7.10 (Cor 7.15 'RP^n is second countable' applies it).

queries.query_text: material around Theorem 7.7: its proof, the corollary it yields, and the definitions it relies on
queries.intent: expansion: bounded neighborhood of Thm 7.7 — its proof, Cor 7.8, and the open-equivalence-relation / Hausdorff definitions.
